title: elaphoglossum auricomum
intro: Elaphoglossum auricomum, also known as Goldback Lip fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to help with various health issues such as reducing fever and relieving pain. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum auricomum are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory problems. Elaphoglossum auricomum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
